body.title: Write warm_context after every turn, not only on clean exit
body.result: Added post-turn _save_warm_context() call in _process() finally block (main.py:2731). Throttled to 30s, gated on not is_impulse. Crash now loses ≤30s state instead of ≤4h. Committed 84e25831.
body.description: main.py _shutdown() calls _save_warm_context() only on intentional exit. If Igor crashes mid-turn, the next boot resumes with warm context up to 4h stale while the DB has moved forward. Fix: call _save_warm_context() at the end of every successful turn (after _process_inner() returns). Accept the 5-10ms disk cost — crash recovery coherence is worth it. SRE finding from deep-audit Panel 11.
